title: BenchMemoOutputV3
description: Structured bench memo (schema v3) with V2 legal-framing fields plus source-grounding metadata.

cited_source_ids.description: Source IDs from the provided allowed snippet list.

source_usage_summary.description: How provided sources informed the memo.

unsupported_legal_claims.description: Legal claims not supported by provided sources.

legal_hallucination_risk.description: Screening risk of unsupported or invented legal authority.
